title: Feature: Agent Notification Inbox — durable SpacetimeDB message queue for agent lifecycle events

steps.description: Add agent_inbox table and 4 reducers (notify_agent, notify_all_agents, acknowledge_notification, expire_stale_notifications) to hexflo-coordination WASM module. notify_agent validates agent exists in hex_agent table. acknowledge_notification validates caller matches target agent_id. notify_all_agents queries hex_agent by project_id and creates one inbox row per agent.
steps.done_condition: cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown succeeds for hexflo-coordination; reducers compile without errors

steps.description: Add IStatePort methods for inbox operations: store_notification, query_inbox (filtered by agent_id, min_priority, unacked-only), acknowledge_notification, expire_notifications. Implement in SpacetimeDB adapter (primary) and SQLite adapter (fallback).
steps.done_condition: IStatePort trait compiles with new methods; both SpacetimeDB and SQLite adapters implement the trait

steps.description: Add HexFlo inbox operations: notify_agent, notify_all_agents, query_inbox, acknowledge_notification, expire_stale. Wire through IStatePort. Add WebSocket broadcast for new notifications (WsEnvelope topic: 'agent_inbox').
steps.done_condition: HexFlo struct exposes inbox methods; cargo build succeeds for hex-nexus

steps.description: Add REST endpoints to hex-nexus: POST /api/agents/:agent_id/notify, GET /api/agents/:agent_id/inbox (query params: min_priority, unacked_only), PATCH /api/agents/notifications/:id/ack, POST /api/agents/notifications/expire. Wire to HexFlo inbox operations. Add agent_id ownership check on ack endpoint.
steps.done_condition: curl POST /api/agents/:id/notify returns 201; GET inbox returns array; PATCH ack returns 200; wrong agent_id returns 403

steps.description: Add notification producers to hex-nexus: (1) binary update detector — watches own binary mtime/hash on a 30s interval, calls notify_all_agents on change; (2) config sync change hook — after ADR-044 sync, if keys changed, calls notify_all_agents with kind='config_change'.
steps.done_condition: hex-nexus binary change triggers notification visible in agent inbox; config sync change triggers notification

steps.description: Add hex CLI commands: 'hex notify <agent-id> <priority> <kind> <payload>' and 'hex inbox [--agent-id] [--min-priority]'. Wire to REST endpoints. Add MCP tools: hex_notify_agent and hex_agent_inbox.
steps.done_condition: 'hex notify' and 'hex inbox' commands work end-to-end; MCP tools callable from Claude Code

steps.description: Create PreToolUse hook script that checks agent inbox via GET /api/agents/$AGENT_ID/inbox?min_priority=2&unacked_only=true. On critical notifications: output formatted warning to stdout. Track 'delivered' state for priority 0-1 in session file to avoid repeat delivery. Priority 2 always re-delivers until acked.
steps.done_condition: PreToolUse hook outputs notification text for unacked priority-2 messages; priority-0 messages delivered only once

steps.description: Implement state preservation protocol: when agent processes a 'restart' notification, (1) update session file with current task/phase/swarm, (2) store key context via hex memory store, (3) acknowledge notification, (4) output restart instruction to user. On session-start hook: check for recent restart notifications in inbox history and inject recovery context.
steps.done_condition: Session file updated before ack; new session restores context from previous restart

steps.description: Add idle agent escalation to hex-nexus: background task checks for unacked priority-2 notifications older than 60s where the target agent's last_heartbeat is also >60s stale. For each, invoke 'claude --resume <session_id> -p "Check your hex inbox for critical notifications"'. Rate-limit to 1 resume per agent per 5 minutes.
steps.done_condition: hex-nexus attempts claude --resume for idle agents with unacked criticals; rate limiting prevents spam

steps.description: Integration tests: (1) end-to-end notify → inbox → ack flow via REST, (2) broadcast to multiple agents, (3) wrong-agent ack rejection, (4) expiry cleanup, (5) hook delivery simulation. Verify against all behavioral specs.
steps.done_condition: All integration tests pass; hex analyze reports no boundary violations

mergeOrder: step-1 → step-2 (SpacetimeDB table then port trait)
step-2 → step-3 (port trait then HexFlo ops)
step-3 → step-4, step-5 parallel (REST endpoints and producers)
step-4 → step-6, step-7 parallel (CLI and hook)
step-6, step-8, step-9 → step-10 (all features then integration)

riskRegister.risk: Hook latency — inbox check adds HTTP round-trip to every tool call
riskRegister.mitigation: Cache inbox response for 5s in session file; only make HTTP call if cache expired

riskRegister.risk: Idle agent resume may fail if Claude Code session expired
riskRegister.mitigation: hex-nexus logs failed resume attempts; agent marked as dead after 3 failed resumes
SQLite fallback via IStatePort; hex-nexus queues notifications locally until StDB reconnects

riskRegister.risk: Notification flood — runaway producer creates thousands of inbox rows
riskRegister.mitigation: Rate limit in reducers: max 10 notifications per agent per minute; expire_stale runs on 1h schedule

successCriteria: hex-nexus binary update triggers priority-2 notification visible to all project agents within 30s
Running Claude Code agent sees notification context in PreToolUse hook stdout
Agent saves session state before acknowledging restart notification
New session after restart includes recovery context from previous state
Idle agent receives notification via claude --resume within 2 minutes
hex inbox CLI command shows pending notifications for current agent
